sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: «لَوْلَا الْمِشَقَّةُ سَادَ النَّاسُ كُلُّهُمْ».
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: «Da nema teškoća, svi bi bili veliki».
sentences.translationEn: The father said: «If not for hardship, everyone would be great».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصُّعُوبَاتِ تُعَلِّمُنَا وَتُقَوِّينَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da nas teškoće uče i jačaju.
sentences.translationEn: This means that difficulties teach us and make us stronger.

sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ نَادِرٌ مِنَ الدَّرَّاجَةِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مَرَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nadir je pao s bicikla više puta.
sentences.translationEn: Nadir fell off the bicycle more than once.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَتَوَقَّفْ وَتَعَلَّمَ رُكُوبَ الدَّرَّاجَةِ فِي النِّهَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nije odustao i na kraju je naučio voziti bicikl.
sentences.translationEn: He did not give up and finally learned to ride the bicycle.
